description_long: This is an adult human figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve athletic top and matching leggings, both featuring a geometric pattern. The clothing appears to be made from a stretchy, form-fitting material, suitable for active or casual urban environments. The figure has a closely cropped hairstyle and is wearing matching shoes that blend seamlessly with the leggings. The overall appearance is modern and streamlined, with no visible accessories or carried objects. The skin tone is medium to dark, and the facial features are neutral and relaxed.
description: An adult standing upright in a T-pose, wearing fitted athletic wear with geometric patterns and matching shoes, featuring a closely cropped hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and the geometric pattern on the shirt and leggings, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted nature of the clothing, and the seamless transition from leggings to shoes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the rear geometric pattern on the shirt and leggings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and body, mirroring the left side with similar clothing and posture details.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
